## SigMap commands

| When | Command |
|------|---------|
| Before answering a question about code | `sigmap ask "<your question>"` |
| After changing config or source dirs | `sigmap validate` |
| To verify an AI answer is grounded | `sigmap judge --response <file>` |

h1 Panduan lengkap: I2S, IP `i2s.v` / AXI, DAC, UART, dan alur data (in & out)
h2 1. Tiga jalur yang sering dicampur (ini penting)
h2 2. I2S itu apa (level konsep)
h2 3. Representasi sampel: **integer** di kabel, bukan float
h2 4. Frekuensi sampling: 8 kHz, 44,1 kHz, 48 kHz, 96 kHz, "384 kHz"
h2 5. RTL kamu **sekarang** (`i2s_slave_lite_v1_0_S00_AXI.v` + `i2s.v`)
h3 5.1 Dua domain clock
h3 5.2 Register **v1** (kebenaran dari kode hari ini)
h3 5.3 Alur data **in → out** (v1)
h3 5.4 Rumus \(F_s\) dan koreksi `FS_MODE`
h2 6. Rencana **v2** (ringkas -- supaya paham arah)

h3 7.2 Apakah PCM5102A "programmable" seperti SPI?
h3 7.3 Apakah DAC mengikuti `i2s.v`?

h1 Outline skripsi: IP I2S TX AXI4-Lite (Basys3, PCM5102A, 24-bit stereo, 2 mode Fs, FIFO, watermark IRQ, Vitis, ILA)
h2 Pemetaan outline (Bab I–V) ke template enam bab LaTeX

h3 2.3 AXI4-Lite
